title: FAIL: Wrong final state (off-by-one in T-operator)
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture: declares wrong final (b,e) after T^100 steps. Simulates an implementation that uses 0-indexed modular arithmetic instead of A1-compliant {1,...,m}. The validator should catch the state mismatch at DR_TOP.

witnesses.label: WRONG: 0-indexed T^100 on (1,1) mod 24
witnesses._note: Deliberately wrong — this is what you get with 0-indexed arithmetic: ((b+e)%24, (e)%24) instead of A1 compliant

witnesses.label: WRONG: T^1000 on (3,5) mod 24
witnesses._note: Off by one in both components

fail_ledger.reason: Used 0-indexed modular arithmetic instead of A1-compliant {1,...,m}. QA axiom A1 requires states in {1,...,N}, never {0,...,N-1}.
